game.name: Attrition
game.desc: Welcome to a world trapped in perpetual fighting. Attrition is a turn-based strategy game where three countries, Lutem, Bertas, and Cualitas, are constantly at war with one-another. Command their armies in a story of opposite opinions, sacrifices for one’s beliefs, and the quest for a greater goal. Here no one’s completely in the wrong, but no one’s completely in the right.
